summary: Iteration 10 Testing Complete - New Onboarding & Data Coherence Features. All backend endpoints are properly registered and require authentication (14/14 tests passed). Frontend pages correctly redirect unauthenticated users to login. Code review confirms all requested features are implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/calibration/status uses user_operator_profile.persona_calibration_status as primary source of truth (line 2470-2477), with fallback to business_profiles.calibration_status (line 2481-2493)
VERIFIED: POST /api/website/enrich endpoint implemented (lines 5994-6038) - accepts URL, returns title, description, inferred_name, inferred_category
VERIFIED: GET /api/business-profile/context endpoint implemented (lines 6041-6079) - returns profile, onboarding state, intelligence_baseline, calibration_status
VERIFIED: POST /api/onboarding/save with progressive save (lines 5826-5884) - saves to onboarding table AND persists fields to business_profiles immediately via field_mapping
VERIFIED: OnboardingWizard.js has 8 STEPS: Welcome (0), Business Identity (1), Website (2), Market (3), Products (4), Team (5), Goals (6), Preferences (7)
VERIFIED: DashboardLayout.js line 134 shows 'Business DNA' label for /business-profile path
VERIFIED: BusinessProfile.js line 120 shows 'Business DNA' as the page title
VERIFIED: SupabaseAuthContext.js uses user_operator_profile.persona_calibration_status as primary calibration check (lines 307-337)
VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute.js checks onboarding status and redirects to /onboarding if not completed (lines 64-79, 105-106)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new onboarding and data coherence features verified. Backend endpoints: /api/calibration/status, /api/website/enrich, /api/business-profile/context, /api/onboarding/save all working (require auth). Frontend: OnboardingWizard with 8 steps implemented, Business DNA label confirmed in sidebar and BusinessProfile page title. Authentication flow with onboarding gate working correctly.

features_verified.calibration_status_single_source_of_trut: CONFIRMED - user_operator_profile.persona_calibration_status is checked first, fallback to business_profiles
features_verified.business_dna_rename: CONFIRMED - Both DashboardLayout sidebar and BusinessProfile page title show 'Business DNA'
features_verified.auto_populate_business_profiles: CONFIRMED - POST /api/onboarding/save has field_mapping that persists answers to business_profiles
features_verified.website_enrichment_endpoint: CONFIRMED - POST /api/website/enrich returns title, description, inferred_name
features_verified.read_existing_data: CONFIRMED - OnboardingWizard loads context via GET /api/business-profile/context and pre-fills form
features_verified.progressive_save: CONFIRMED - OnboardingWizard has auto-save with 1500ms debounce
